name: Khan Skewer Restaurant
tagline: Xinjiang-style lamb skewers heavy on cumin and charcoal — the only spot on Oahu doing this regional Chinese BBQ right.
mustOrder: lamb skewers — cumin-crusted, charcoal-grilled, the signature
cold dishes — cucumber salad, wood ear mushroom
parking: Street parking on Isenberg St; side streets toward University
talkStory: The only authentic Xinjiang-style BBQ restaurant on Oahu, tucked on Isenberg Street near UH Manoa with zero tourist foot traffic. The lamb skewers are cumin-crusted and charcoal-grilled in the Northwest Chinese tradition — the same style you'd find at night markets in Urumqi or Xi'an. The clientele is overwhelmingly local Chinese and Asian community who know exactly what this food should taste like. Hand-pulled noodles and cold cucumber salad round out the order. Open for dinner, closed Tuesdays.
